title: New labour code: What changes for your earned leave and encashment under the latest laws — explained
summary: The OSH Code introduces significant changes to leave policies, allowing workers to carry forward up to 30 days of leave and encash excess leave. Here are more details about the provision and who it applies to.

title: Credit card fraud is rising: Types, warning signs and expert tips to protect your finances
summary: Credit card fraud is a growing threat, often unnoticed until significant damage occurs. Reporting fraud promptly, understanding various fraud types, and consistently monitoring credit activity can help protect individuals from financial losses and maintain peace of mind.

title: Want to invest ₹1 lakh? Here's how FD laddering will help you maximise gains
summary: Bank FD laddering is a technique that involves buying multiple FDs maturing at different time periods. Personal finance experts suggest that investors seeking to invest in bank fixed deposits for a longer period may consider a ladder strategy.

title: GPF interest rates: How much are the latest interest rates on General Provident Fund? What Finance Ministry said
summary: General Provident Fund or GPF is the provident fund meant exclusively for government employees. Under this compulsory savings scheme, every government employee must contribute a portion of their pay to save towards their future.

title: DA hike delayed for first time in a decade — Will it be skipped or deferred? Experts weigh in
summary: Uncertainty surrounds the DA hike delay. Experts describe it as a procedural deferment rather than a cancellation, adding that arrears are expected and that the inflation-linked revision will likely be implemented retrospectively across central government salaries and pensions.

title: How to pay zero income tax on ₹15.85 lakh salary under new tax regime
summary: Meal vouchers, NPS and smart salary structuring can legally bring your taxable income below ₹12 lakh and reduce your tax to zero

title: US consumer sentiment dives to a record low in April amid Iran war
summary: U.S. consumer sentiment plunged to a ​record low in ​early April and consumers anticipated a ​surge in inflation in the next 12 months, a survey showed on Friday.

title: Ceasefire sends dollar toward weekly drop with US-Iran talks in focus
summary: Investors are shifting their focus as the dollar declines, buoyed by the resumption of oil shipping after a ceasefire in the Gulf alleviates war anxieties with Iran. This shift has sparked a sell-off in safe-haven assets, with the euro and sterling enjoying gains.

title: Copper claws higher to three-week peak as investors balance Iran with Chinese demand

title: Railway infra company Vishal Nirmiti gets Sebi nod for IPO
summary: Vishal Nirmiti has secured Securities and Exchange Board of India approval for its IPO, comprising a fresh issue and offer for sale, with proceeds aimed at working capital, debt reduction and supporting growth across railway and EPC infrastructure segments

title: US consumer inflation surges 3.3% year-on-year as Iran war impact bites
summary: Consumer inflation in the United States rose sharply to 3.3 percent in March, government data showed Wednesday, as higher energy prices due to the war in the Middle East hit Americans hard. By comparison, the consumer price index (CPI) rose only 2.4 percent year-on-year a month earlier.

title: FIIs cut stakes in these 9 stocks in March quarter. Do you own any?
